creator: gabor@acm.org
text:
I almost forgot I have the infamous CMD640B, with the option enabled in
the kernel and workaround enable per dmesg.  I also have a full-house:

options         "CMD640"        # work around CMD640 chip deficiency
controller      wdc0    at isa? port "IO_WD1" bio irq 14 flags
0x80ff80ff vector
 wdintr
disk            wd0     at wdc0 drive 0 # 1 GB
disk            wd1     at wdc0 drive 1 # 2 GB

controller      wdc1    at isa? port "IO_WD2" bio irq 15 flags
0x000080ff vector
 wdintr
disk            wd2     at wdc1 drive 0 # 540 MB
#disk           wd3     at wdc1 drive 1 # ATAPI CD-ROM (SONY 55E 2x)

options         ATAPI           #Enable ATAPI support for IDE bus
options         ATAPI_STATIC    #Don't do it as an LKM
device          wcd0    #IDE CD-ROM

-- 
Gabor Kincses
(gabor@acm.org)
FreeBSD 2.2.5-STABLE
